feat.name: Friendly Nudge
feat.text: You don't always have time to wait for your allies to make room, so it's best to politely move them yourself. Attempt an Athletics check to Shove an ally. You don't need to have a free hand to attempt this check. If your ally is willing, treat the result as one degree of success higher.

traits.name: Minotaur
traits.text: Minotaurs are horned, bovine humanoids with a mastery of mazes and puzzles.
